parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ sender_id: $json.sender_id, recipient_id: $json.recipient_id, instagram_username: $json.instagram_username, message_text: $json.message_text, raw_event: $json.raw_event }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { _skip: true, reason: 'no_valid_messages', should_reply: false } }];
